payload.description: The Charter for the Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad was adopted by the Board Chair and a majority of the members of Board of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, as amended on March 21, 2018

evidence_refs.source_quote: as amended on March 21, 2018

payload.claim_text: The Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad shall assist the Board Chair and the Board in fulfilling their responsibility to monitor and oversee the operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Committee purpose

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad (the "Committee") shall assist the Board Chair and the Board in fulfilling their responsibility to monitor and oversee the operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company

payload.claim_text: The Committee is empowered to investigate any matter brought to its attention. The chairperson of the Committee shall have access to all books, records, facilities and staff of the MTA and/or Metro-North.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Committee investigative authority and access rights

evidence_refs.source_quote: In discharging its role, the Committee is empowered to investigate any matter brought to its attention. To facilitate any such investigation, the chairperson of the Committee shall have access to all books, records, facilities and staff of the MTA and/or Metro-North.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall consist of 3 or more members of the Board, appointed by the Board Chair. If not otherwise a member of the Committee, each Vice-Chair of the Board shall be an ex officio member.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Committee composition and appointment rules

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee shall consist of 3 or more members of the Board, appointed by the Board Chair. If not otherwise a member of the Committee, each Vice-Chair of the Board shall be an ex officio member of the Committee.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall meet on a regularly-scheduled basis at least 11 times per year, and more frequently as circumstances dictate. Meetings shall be open to the public.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Committee meeting frequency and public access rules

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Committee shall meet on a regularly-scheduled basis at least 11 times per year, and more frequently as circumstances dictate.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall: 1. monitor and update the Board on operating performance of Metro-North; 2. monitor and update on safety record including customer and employee safety; 3. monitor and update on security programs; 4. monitor and update on finances including financial reports, ridership reports, and use of funds; 5. review procurement contracts requiring Board approval; 6. review and make recommendations on proposed capital projects of Metro-North and monitor their status
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Key responsibilities items 1-6

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. monitor and update the Board Chair and the Board on the operating performance of Metro-North, including information on railroad service; 2. monitor and update ... on the safety record ... customer and employee safety; 3. monitor and update ... on the implementation of security programs ...; 4. monitor and update ... on the finances of Metro-North, including financial reports, ridership reports, and the use of funds; 5. review and make recommendations ... regarding proposed procurement contracts ... requiring Board approval; 6. review and make recommendations ... on proposed capital projects of Metro-North and monitor the status of such projects

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall: 7. review and make recommendations regarding Metro-North service and policy changes requiring Board approval; 8. facilitate identification of approaches addressing Metro-North security issues including best practices in national and international security; 9. review periodically with Counsel of MTA, Chief Compliance Officer, and Counsel of Metro-North legal/regulatory matters and compliance policies and programs
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Key responsibilities items 7-9

evidence_refs.source_quote: 7. review and make recommendations ... regarding Metro-North service and policy changes that require Board approval; 8. facilitate the identification of approaches and solutions that address Metro-North security issues, including best practices in national and international security ...; 9. review periodically with the Counsel of the MTA, the Chief Compliance Officer, and the Counsel of Metro-North: (i) legal and regulatory matters ...; (ii) the scope and effectiveness of compliance policies and programs

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.claim_text: With respect to capital projects undertaken by MTACC on behalf of Metro-North: 1. Review and make recommendations on proposed procurements requiring Board approval; 2. Review and make recommendations on contract procurement solicitations; 3. Monitor progress of capital projects; 4. Monitor budget and schedule of capital projects; 5. Monitor progress of contract commitments and completions; 6. Track funding needs and availability of funds from all sources
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: MTACC capital project oversight responsibilities

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Review and make recommendations ... with respect to the proposed procurements made by the MTACC that require Board approval; 2. Review and make recommendations ... with respect to contract procurement solicitations that require Board approval; 3. Monitor the progress of the capital projects undertaken by the MTACC; 4. Monitor the budget and the schedule of capital projects undertaken by the MTACC; 5. Monitor the progress of contract commitments and completions with respect to capital projects; and 6. Track funding needs of capital projects as well as the availability of funds

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall: 1. set the annual work plan for the committee; 2. conduct an annual self-evaluation of performance, including effectiveness and compliance with this Charter; 3. review and assess the adequacy of this Charter annually; 4. report regularly to the Board Chair and Board on findings and recommendations, and maintain minutes or other records
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
payload.description: Additional committee responsibilities including self-evaluation and annual charter review

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. set the annual work plan for the committee; 2. conduct an annual self-evaluation of the performance of the Committee, including its effectiveness and compliance with this Charter; 3. review and assess the adequacy of this Charter annually; and 4. report regularly to the Board Chair and the Board on Committee findings and recommendations
